subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the sweet-scented breezes of God! I have read thy recent letter and learned of that which thou didst utter during the meeting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المنجذب بنفحات الله قد قرئت تحریرک الاخیر و اطلعت بما نطقت عند ملاقات
subcodes.subjects: @critique of Western values; culture, @suffering and imprisonment
